selections.name: Farnciful
selections.reason: Resuming after a long spell but looked sharp winning a recent trial. Debut on heavy track was okay, should handle the Soft 6 well.

selections.name: Hellavalegacy
selections.reason: Resuming. Trialled well enough and has shown ability in lone start. Kris Lees stable respects.

selections.name: Magatama
selections.reason: Fair effort on debut at Port Macquarie. Will be better for the run and draws well.

selections.name: Kadani (NZ)
selections.reason: First starter with three trials. Watch betting for stable confidence.

danger_horse.name: Hellavalegacy
danger_horse.reason: Stable has a good strike rate and horse has trialled well.

selections.name: Warm Front
selections.reason: Very consistent recently with a 2nd at Muswellbrook on heavy going last start. Handles the wet and looks ready to win.

selections.name: Pear Bellini
selections.reason: Placed in last two starts. Drawn the inside and should get a lovely run.

selections.name: King Country
selections.reason: Improved effort to finish 3rd at this track last start. Stepping up to the mile should suit.

selections.name: Robbed By Rob
selections.reason: Finished 3rd behind Warm Front last start. Meets that runner on similar terms.

danger_horse.name: Pear Bellini
danger_horse.reason: Consistent form and maps perfectly from barrier 1.

selections.name: Too Hard To Find
selections.reason: Coming off a solid 2nd at Lismore. Consistent type who maps well from the low draw.

selections.name: Carmine
selections.reason: Resuming. Has placed on heavy going previously and usually performs well fresh.

selections.name: Intelligencer
selections.reason: Finished 2nd two starts back at Port Macquarie. Can bounce back from a fair effort last time.

selections.name: Our Pappy
selections.reason: Finished 4th at this track last start. Drawn the rails and should be competitive.

danger_horse.name: Carmine
danger_horse.reason: Fresh record is good and handles the sting out of the ground.

selections.name: Piccaderro
selections.reason: Won maiden well then backed it up with a solid 2nd in BM58 grade. The form horse of the race.

selections.name: Explosive Tycoon
selections.reason: Finished 2nd at Muswellbrook on heavy going last start. Conditions suit.

selections.name: Annoint
selections.reason: Resumed with a good 2nd at Queanbeyan. Fitter for that run.

selections.name: Jason Darren
selections.reason: Consistent recently, finishing 3rd last start. Drawn well.

danger_horse.name: Explosive Tycoon
danger_horse.reason: Proven in the wet and racing in good form.

selections.name: Kid Billy
selections.reason: Chasing a hat-trick after two impressive wins. Handles soft tracks well and is in peak form.

selections.name: Steely Girl
selections.reason: Won well at Port Macquarie last start. Drawn the pole and stays in contention.

selections.name: Damascus Gate
selections.reason: Runner-up in last two starts. Consistent performer who deserves a win.

selections.name: Shutter
selections.reason: Won two starts back before a fair effort last time. Can bounce back in this grade.

danger_horse.name: Steely Girl
danger_horse.reason: Last start winner with the inside draw.

selections.name: Lune D'excellence
selections.reason: Last start winner on heavy going. Conditions suit perfectly and form is on the up.

selections.name: Jaex
selections.reason: Drops significantly in class from recent runs in BM64/74 grade. Big threat at this level.

selections.name: Bonus Tempus
selections.reason: Finished 2nd last start. Consistent veteran who is always around the mark.

selections.name: Savvyrocker
selections.reason: Consistent type, rarely far away. Wide draw is a slight concern but has ability.

selections.name: Pixie Hallow
selections.reason: Winner last start at Grafton on soft going. Loves the wet and is the one to beat.

selections.name: Bjorn Ironside
selections.reason: Drops in class after a solid 5th in BM74 grade. Should find this easier.

selections.name: Bethsheba
selections.reason: Won two starts back and wasn't disgraced in higher grade last time. Value chance.

selections.name: The Piccolino
selections.reason: Resuming. Has trialled okay and has ability when right.
